privileged_info_summary: The create_employee task operates on Odoo 17 Community Edition with official HR demo data (20 pre-loaded employees, 7 departments, 7 job positions). The server runs at http://localhost:8069 with admin/admin credentials. The task requires creating an employee named Sarah Mitchell with job position 'Experienced Developer' (an existing job position in the demo data) and department 'Research & Development' (an existing department). The environment uses Odoo's built-in demo data from hr/data/hr_demo.xml and related modules, not synthetic data. Task timeout is 240 seconds with a max of 30 steps.
